name: ai-video-promo-engine
description: End-to-end AI video promo production engine: brainstorm → script → image prompts (NB2) → video prompts (VEO 3.1). Generates complete 2-3 minute promotional video production packages for any brand.

agents.name: promo-engine-agent
agents.description: Subagent for batch/complex promo production — generates complete video production packages

agents.name: prompt-reviewer
agents.description: Independent validator — reviews NB2/VEO prompt batches for quality, consistency, and rule compliance
